OmniScript.description: Submits the application form for a financial assistance program.
OmniScript.name: FinancialAssistanceProgram_ApplicationForm

childElements.name: LsFinclAsstApplicationReview

omniProcessElements.name: ApplicationReview
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "$standardLabel.LSApplicationIntake.ApplicationSummary", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Previous", "previousWidth" : 3.0, "nextLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Submit", "nextWidth" : 3.0, "cancelLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.AreYouSure", "saveLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.SaveForLater", "saveMessage" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.SaveMessage", "completeLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Complete", "completeMessage" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.CompleteMessage", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000.0, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000.0, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: CANCEL
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Cancel", "validationRequired" : "Submit", "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "pubsub" : true, "message" : { "IsApplicationFormSubmitted" : false }, "targetType" : "Current Page", "objectAction" : "home", "recordAction" : "view", "loginAction" : "login", "targetFilter" : "Recent", "targetId" : "%CareProgramEnrolleeId%", "variant" : "brand", "iconName" : "", "iconVariant" : "", "iconPosition" : "left", "replace" : false, "targetLWCLayout" : "lightning", "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: CreateApplicationFormAndRelatedRecordsWithAttachments
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "$standardLabel.LSApplicationIntake.CreateApplicationAndLinkagesIP", "integrationProcedureKey" : "LsFinclAsst_CreateApplicationFormAndRelatedRecordsWithAttachments", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "ProgramId" : "%ProgramId%", "CareProgramEnrolleeId" : "%CareProgramEnrolleeId%", "AccountId" : "%AccountId%" }, "inProgressMessage" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.InProgress", "postMessage" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Done", "failureNextLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.GoBack", "failureAbortMessage" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.AreYouSure", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "$standardLabel.LSApplicationIntake.GetSelectedDrugsDataDM", "integrationProcedureKey" : "LsFinclAsst_GetSelectedDrugsData", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "SelectedDrugs" : "%PatientInsuranceDetails:LSC_FA_v2_PatientPrescribedDrugs%" }, "inProgressMessage" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.InProgress", "postMessage" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Done", "failureNextLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.GoBack", "failureAbortMessage" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.AreYouSure", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "$standardLabel.LSApplicationIntake.SecondaryInsuranceDateValidator", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12.0, "expression" : "%LSC_FA_v2_SecondaryInsuranceStartDate% <> NULL && %LSC_FA_v2_SecondaryInsuranceEndDate% <> NULL && %LSC_FA_v2_SecondaryInsuranceStartDate% >= %LSC_FA_v2_SecondaryInsuranceEndDate%", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : "Boolean", "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }
